category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/Cretezy/lazyjj describes lazyjj as a TUI for Jujutsu/jj built with Ratatui.
source_facts.description says it is a TUI for Jujutsu/jj.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses lazyjj.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
Official GitHub repository contains a docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/Cretezy/lazyjj, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says it is built in Rust with Ratatui and interacts with the jj CLI.
